data.name: Site_Error_New
data.value: Error occurred while processing your request. Please contact your administrator

data.name: Site_Error
data.value: Error occurred while processing your request. Please contact your administrator

data.name: Login_RedirectMSG
data.value: The page you are accessing requires a login. You are now redirected to login page. Please wait..

data.name: Security_notice
data.value: Security notice: up to Protected B only

data.name: Security_notice_Text
data.value: This site is not approved by Guchet Unique/Service of Ministry of Justice of DRC for storage above Protected B information. Only up to Protected B information may be stored on this site.

data.name: Choose_XML_File
data.value: Choose a XML File to Fill out the Form

data.name: FileA
data.value: To continue to work off an existing form, browse for the draft file (in XML format) here:

data.name: Load_Draft_File_type_Err
data.value: Load a draft XML file: file type is invalid

data.name: Declaration_Text
data.value: I hereby specify that the above information is correct in all respects.

data.name: Consent
data.value: By submitting your personal information, you are consenting to its collection, use and disclosure in accordance with the privacy notice statement.

data.name: Consent_Error
data.value: Privacy notice statement checkbox - This field is required.

data.name: Confirm_Signature
data.value: Please ensure that you complete the 'Signature' field either on the downloaded DOC version of the form, or on the paper version, as applicable.

data.name: Confirm_Signature_Error
data.value: Signature checkbox - This field is required.

data.name: App_PageNotFound
data.value: Sorry, there's nothing at this address.

data.name: Index_Instructions_Detail_3
data.value: Please note, all responses are provided during hours of operation, Monday to Friday, only.

data.name: LetUsWhatDoYouWantToDo
data.value: Let us know what do you want to do!

data.name: Qu_Title_Desc
data.value: If you would like to add comments for e-GUCE review, please do so in the field below.

data.name: YouAreOnPortalForEGuceProcedures
data.value: You are on the portal for access to e-GUCE procedures.

data.name: WeHelpYouChooseTheTypeOfCompany
data.value: WE HELP YOU CHOOSE THE TYPE OF COMPANY THAT SUITS YOU BEST

data.name: OnlinePaymentAndLimitation
data.value: ONLINE PAYMENT AND LIMITATION OF HUMAN INTERVENTIONS

data.name: TheProcedureIsNowSimpleAndEffective
data.value: THE PROCEDURE IS NOW SIMPLE AND EFFECTIVE FOR THE APPLICANT

data.name: FileProcessUnder24h
data.value: Request processed in less than 24 hours!

data.name: BusinessCreationIsDoneOnceYouCreateAnAccount
data.value: Company creation is done once you have created an identification form or an account on our e-GUCE application to receive personal and confidential documents. e-GUCE was created to simplify and facilitate your steps in creating your structure in under security watch.

data.name: DoneBeforeFromOurDatabaseToReserveNewName
data.value: It is done instantly online at the beginning of the process in our databases to reassure yourself of reserving an unique commercial name of your company

data.name: ThePaymentReceivedOnlineWillGenerate
data.value: The payment received online will generate the delivery of the collection note established and delivered electronically on the DGRAD part

data.name: RegistrationTheConditionsHavingBeenMet
data.value: Registration: the conditions having been met and validated online, you complete the form and register the required information.

data.name: FromThisMomentOnTheOtherServices
data.value: From this moment on: the other services intervene electronically, for the automatic processing of your file. Chrono running… for the 3 hours

data.name: ForRapidSupportWeProvideYou
data.value: For rapid support, we provide you with your documents to download once the procedure is complete.

data.name: TransferOfHeadOfficeChangeOfAddressEtc
data.value: Transfer of head office, change of address, change of directors, sales of shares etc.

data.name: CentPercentUpToDateLegalDocuments
data.value: 100% up-to-date legal documents. Our lawyers integrate the latest developments in the law, decrees and case law every day.

data.name: AQuickAndEasySolution
data.value: A quick and easy solution. You gain efficiency by completing our online forms in just a few minutes and immediately uploading your documents.

data.name: ImpressiveSavings
data.value: Impressive savings. Our e-GUCE tool allows us to offer you services at costs 10 to 20 times cheaper.

data.name: Dissolutionpermanentcessationofactivityradiation
data.value: Dissolution, permanent cessation of activity, radiation

data.name: Thisapplicationmaynolongerrespond
data.value: An error has occurred. This application may no longer respond until reloaded.

data.name: Seebrowserdevtools
data.value: An unhandled exception has occurred. See browser dev tools for details.

data.name: youareontheportalforaccesstoe-GUCEprocedures
data.value: you are on the portal for access to e-GUCE procedures

data.name: SelectTheProcedureCorresponding
data.value: Select the procedure corresponding to the operation you wish to perform

data.name: StartANewProcedureByClickingRegister
data.value: Start a new procedure by clicking on the button Register

data.name: ForTheCongolese
data.value: For the Congolese, by the Congolese.

data.name: ObtainAllRequiredDocumentsAndRegistrationNumbers
data.value: Obtain all required documents and registration numbers

data.name: Youcancreateanewcompanyname
data.value: You can create a new company name

data.name: Choosepaymentmethodprovidedetails.
data.value: Choose a payment method and provide the required details.

data.name: Iconfirmtheabovedetailscorrect
data.value: I confirm the above details are correct

data.name: SelectCompanyTypeToSeeDetailsandProceed
data.value: Select a company type above to see details and proceed to the next step
